- [ ] Secrets are not logged or returned unredacted
- [ ] Tests added or updated where appropriate
- [ ] Docs / CHANGELOG updated if user-facing
- [ ] For releases: `VERSION`, `frontend/package.json`, and `CHANGELOG.md` are in sync
